title: HomeHold
description: Optimized vanilla styled modpack with new endgame content and simple multiplayer utils
body:
# The modpack was created to expand end-game content in the form of new bosses and armor.
Perhaps you are bored with the usual vanilla Minecraft, but at the same time you would not want to delve into the study of any complex mods. This modpack was created to solve this problem!

Build your village, explore new End and Deep worlds, upgrade your armor

- Develop your village your way!
- Explore the secrets of a mysterious cult!
- Explore the new Deep Dark World!
- New End!
- Backpacks!
- Make the greatest chest!
## 
## Vanilla style modpack with new endgame content
Fully works in multiplayer!

The modpack is based on this client modpack [Fabulously Optimized
Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)
[https://download.fo/](https://download.fo/)

Mod menu [https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu/](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu/)

You can use this modpack as you wish, according to the rules of these modders whose mods were used
